description: Create a two-column content slide on November PMI surveys with horizontal bar charts comparing November vs prior 3-month average for manufacturing and services across major economies, plus a right-side line chart of PMI trends over time.

header.headline: Major economies are closing out 2025 with continued manufacturing weakness and stable but moderate services activity, with the US remaining the outperformer

left.title: PMI comparisons across major economies
left.body: Horizontal bar-chart comparison of November versus previous 3-month average PMIs for Euro area, United Kingdom, Germany, Australia, Japan, France, and United States, split into Manufacturing and Services sections.
